checks.description: Detect JUnit 4 dependencies, imports, assertions, lifecycle annotations, and runners.
Detect JUnit Jupiter or JUnit Platform usage when projects already have partial JUnit 5 adoption.
Find org.junit.Test, Assert, Before, and After usage that should be migrated to Jupiter APIs.
Find RunWith-based tests that need explicit extension or runner migration review.
Find Vintage engine usage that may hide incomplete JUnit 5 migration work.
Capture Maven or Gradle compile and test validation after test migration preparation.
Summarize compile, test, rollback, compatibility, and confidence evidence for Professional packaging.
